1→"""Candidate search module for Boss直聘.
     2→
     3→Handles searching for candidates on Boss直聘's talent search pages:
     4→- Search page: /web/chat/search (搜索候选人)
     5→- Job list: /web/chat/job/list (职位管理)
     6→
     7→Uses page.evaluate() for JavaScript-based DOM extraction rather than
     8→CSS selectors for better reliability against page structure changes.
     9→"""
    10→
    11→import hashlib
    12→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    13→from typing import List, Optional, Set
    14→from urllib.parse import urlencode
    15→
    16→from patchright.async_api import Page
    17→from loguru import logger
    18→from rich.console import Console
    19→from rich.table import Table
    20→
    21→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    22→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    23→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    24→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    25→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    26→console = Console()
    27→
    28→
    29→@dataclass
    30→class CandidateBasic:
    31→    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    32→    boss_id: str
    33→    name: str
    34→    title: str
    35→    company: str
    36→    location: Optional[str] = None
    37→    salary_expect: Optional[str] = None
    38→    work_years: Optional[str] = None
    39→    education_level: Optional[str] = None
    40→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    41→    _score: int = field(default=0, init=False, repr=False)
    42→
    43→    def __hash__(self):
    44→        return hash(self.boss_id)
    45→
    46→    def __eq__(self, other):
    47→        if isinstance(other, CandidateBasic):
    48→            return self.boss_id == other.boss_id
    49→        return False
    50→
    51→
    52→# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    53→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    54→    "销售", "产品经理", "市场", "运营", "行政", "人事", "财务",
    55→    "法务", "采购", "客服", "前台", "助理", "秘书",
    56→}
    57→
    58→
    59→def _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    60→    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    61→    if not title:
    62→        return False
    63→    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    64→        if keyword in title:
    65→            return True
    66→    return False
    67→
    68→
    69→def _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    70→    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash.
    71→
    72→    Uses SHA-256 with 20 hex chars to reduce collision probability
    73→    compared to MD5 with 12 chars.
    74→    """
    75→    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    76→    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    77→    return f"zp_{h}"
    78→
    79→
    80→# JavaScript extraction function for Boss直聘 search results page
    81→EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """
    82→() => {
    83→    const candidates = [];
    84→
    85→    // Strategy 1: Look for candidate cards in search results
    86→    // Boss直聘 search result cards typically have geek info containers
    87→    const cards = document.querySelectorAll(
    88→        '[class*="card-inner"], [class*="geek-card"], [class*="candidate-card"], ' +
    89→        '[class*="recommend-card"], [class*="job-card-wrap"], [class*="user-item"]'
    90→    );
    91→
    92→    for (const card of cards) {
    93→        try {
    94→            // Extract name
    95→            const nameEl = card.querySelector(
    96→                '[class*="name"], [class*="geek-name"], h3, [class*="username"]'
    97→            );
    98→            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    99→
   100→            if (!name || name.length > 20) continue;
   101→
   102→            // Extract title/position
   103→            const titleEl = card.querySelector(
   104→                '[class*="title"], [class*="position"], [class*="expect-position"], ' +
   105→                '[class*="job-title"]'
   106→            );
   107→            const title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   108→
   109→            // Extract company
   110→            const companyEl = card.querySelector(
   111→                '[class*="company"], [class*="comp-name"]'
   112→            );
   113→            const company = companyEl ? companyEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   114→
   115→            // Extract location
   116→            const locationEl = card.querySelector(
   117→                '[class*="area"], [class*="location"], [class*="city"]'
   118→            );
   119→            const location = locationEl ? locationEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   120→
   121→            // Extract salary expectation
   122→            const salaryEl = card.querySelector(
   123→                '[class*="salary"], [class*="expect-salary"]'
   124→            );
   125→            const salary = salaryEl ? salaryEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   126→
   127→            // Extract work years
   128→            const yearsEl = card.querySelector(
   129→                '[class*="work-year"], [class*="experience"]'
   130→            );
   131→            const workYears = yearsEl ? yearsEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   132→
   133→            // Extract education
   134→            const eduEl = card.querySelector(
   135→                '[class*="education"], [class*="degree"], [class*="edu"]'
   136→            );
   137→            const education = eduEl ? eduEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   138→
   139→            // Try to extract profile URL and encrypted geek ID
   140→            let profileUrl = '';
   141→            let bossId = '';
   142→
   143→            // Check for links in the card
   144→            const link = card.querySelector('a[href*="/web/geek/"], a[href*="geek"], a[href*="resume"]');
   145→            if (link) {
   146→                profileUrl = link.href;
   147→                // Try to extract encryptGeekId from URL
   148→                const match = profileUrl.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   149→                if (match) {
   150→                    bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   151→                }
   152→            }
   153→
   154→            // Fallback: check data attributes
   155→            if (!bossId) {
   156→                const dataId = card.getAttribute('data-geekid') ||
   157→                               card.getAttribute('data-uid') ||
   158→                               card.getAttribute('data-id') ||
   159→                               card.getAttribute('data-encrypt-id');
   160→                if (dataId) {
   161→                    bossId = 'zp_' + dataId;
   162→                }
   163→            }
   164→
   165→            // Fallback: check card onclick or inner links for IDs
   166→            if (!bossId) {
   167→                const allLinks = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   168→                for (const a of allLinks) {
   169→                    const href = a.href;
   170→                    const match = href.match(/encryptGeekId=([^&]+)/);
   171→                    if (match) {
   172→                        bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   173→                        if (!profileUrl) profileUrl = href;
   174→                        break;
   175→                    }
   176→                }
   177→            }
   178→
   179→            candidates.push({
   180→                boss_id: bossId,
   181→                name: name,
   182→                title: title,
   183→                company: company,
   184→                location: location,
   185→                salary_expect: salary,
   186→                work_years: workYears,
   187→                education_level: education,
   188→                profile_url: profileUrl
   189→            });
   190→        } catch (e) {
   191→            console.error('Error extracting candidate:', e);
   192→        }
   193→    }
   194→
   195→    // Strategy 2: If no cards found, try extracting from list items
   196→    if (candidates.length === 0) {
   197→        const listItems = document.querySelectorAll(
   198→            '[class*="geek-list"] > *, [class*="resume-list"] > *, ' +
   199→            '[class*="talent-list"] > *, [class*="recommend-list"] > *'
   200→        );
   201→
   202→        for (const item of listItems) {
   203→            try {
   204→                const text = item.innerText || '';
   205→                const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   206→                if (lines.length < 2) continue;
   207→
   208→                const name = lines[0].trim();
   209→                if (!name || name.length > 20) continue;
   210→
   211→                const title = lines.length > 1 ? lines[1].trim() : '';
   212→                const company = lines.length > 2 ? lines[2].trim() : '';
   213→
   214→                let bossId = '';
   215→                const link = item.querySelector('a[href]');
   216→                if (link) {
   217→                    const match = link.href.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   218→                    if (match) bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   219→                }
   220→
   221→                candidates.push({
   222→                    boss_id: bossId,
   223→                    name: name,
   224→                    title: title,
   225→                    company: company,
   226→                    location: '',
   227→                    salary_expect: '',
   228→                    work_years: '',
   229→                    education_level: '',
   230→                    profile_url: link ? link.href : ''
   231→                });
   232→            } catch (e) {
   233→                continue;
   234→            }
   235→        }
   236→    }
   237→
   238→    return candidates;
   239→}
   240→"""
   241→
   242→
   243→async def search_candidates(
   244→    keywords: List[str],
   245→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   246→    max_pages: int = 1,
   247→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   248→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   249→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   250→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   251→    start_page: int = 1,
   252→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   253→    """
   254→    Search for candidates on Boss直聘.
   255→
   256→    Supports multi-keyword search with deduplication.
   257→
   258→    Args:
   259→        keywords: List of search keywords
   260→        location: Location filter (e.g., "北京")
   261→        max_pages: Maximum number of pages to scrape per keyword
   262→        experience: Experience filter (e.g., "3-5年")
   263→        education: Education filter (e.g., "本科")
   264→        salary: Salary filter (e.g., "20-40K")
   265→        browser: Browser manager instance
   266→
   267→    Returns:
   268→        List of CandidateBasic instances
   269→    """
   270→    if browser is None:
   271→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   272→
   273→    page = browser.page
   274→    if not page:
   275→        page = await browser.start()
   276→
   277→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   278→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   279→
   280→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   281→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   282→    seen_dedup_keys: Set[str] = set()
   283→
   284→    for keyword in keywords:
   285→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   286→
   287→        # Rate limit check
   288→        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   289→
   290→        try:
   291→            # Navigate to search page
   292→            search_url = _build_search_url(keyword, location, experience, education, salary)
   293→            await page.goto(search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   294→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   295→
   296→            # Check for captcha
   297→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   298→
   299→            # Check for quota exhaustion page
   300→            if await _check_quota_exhausted(page):
   301→                console.print("[red]Daily contact quota exhausted. Stopping search.[/red]")
   302→                break
   303→
   304→            # Boss直聘 uses infinite scroll (auto-load on scroll), no pagination buttons.
   305→            # Scroll multiple rounds to load more candidates.
   306→            # start_page allows resuming from a previous scroll position.
   307→            total_rounds = start_page + max_pages - 1
   308→            for scroll_round in range(start_page, total_rounds + 1):
   309→                console.print(f"  [dim]Scroll round {scroll_round}/{total_rounds}...[/dim]")
   310→
   311→                # Scroll within the content container to trigger auto-load.
   312→                # The page uses an inner scrollable container, not window scroll.
   313→                await _scroll_search_results(page)
   314→                await async_random_delay('scroll')
   315→
   316→            # Extract candidates via JavaScript after all scrolling is done
   317→            raw_candidates = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS)
   318→
   319→            if not raw_candidates:
   320→                logger.warning(f"No candidates found for '{keyword}'")
   321→                continue
   322→
   323→            # Process results
   324→            page_count = 0
   325→            for raw in raw_candidates:
   326→                name = raw.get('name', '').strip()
   327→                title = raw.get('title', '').strip()
   328→                company = raw.get('company', '').strip()
   329→
   330→                if not name:
   331→                    continue
   332→
   333→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   334→                if _is_non_rd_role(title):
   335→                    continue
   336→
   337→                # Generate or use boss_id
   338→                boss_id = raw.get('boss_id', '')
   339→                if not boss_id:
   340→                    boss_id = _generate_boss_id(name, company)
   341→
   342→                # Deduplicate
   343→                if boss_id in seen_ids:
   344→                    continue
   345→
   346→                # Also check name+company dedup
   347→                dedup_key = f"{name}_{company}"
   348→                if dedup_key in seen_dedup_keys:
   349→                    continue
   350→
   351→                seen_ids.add(boss_id)
   352→                seen_dedup_keys.add(dedup_key)
   353→
   354→                candidate = CandidateBasic(
   355→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   356→                    name=name,
   357→                    title=title,
   358→                    company=company,
   359→                    location=raw.get('location', ''),
   360→                    salary_expect=raw.get('salary_expect', ''),
   361→                    work_years=raw.get('work_years', ''),
   362→                    education_level=raw.get('education_level', ''),
   363→                    profile_url=raw.get('profile_url', ''),
   364→                )
   365→
   366→                all_candidates.append(candidate)
   367→                page_count += 1
   368→
   369→            # Log action
   370→            rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   371→                'keyword': keyword,
   372→                'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   373→                'results': page_count,
   374→            })
   375→
   376→            console.print(f"  [green]Found {page_count} candidates for '{keyword}'[/green]")
   377→
   378→            # Save search history
   379→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   380→                history = SearchHistory(
   381→                    criteria={
   382→                        'keywords': keyword,
   383→                        'location': location,
   384→                        'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   385→                        'experience': experience,
   386→                        'education': education,
   387→                        'salary': salary,
   388→                    },
   389→                    results_count=page_count,
   390→                )
   391→                session.add(history)
   392→
   393→        except Exception as e:
   394→            logger.error(f"Error searching for '{keyword}': {e}")
   395→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   396→            rate_limiter.report_error()
   397→
   398→    # Save candidates to database
   399→    _save_candidates_to_db(all_candidates, keywords, db_manager)
   400→
   401→    # Display results summary
   402→    _display_results(all_candidates, keywords)
   403→
   404→    return all_candidates
   405→
   406→
   407→def _build_search_url(
   408→    keyword: str,
   409→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   410→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   411→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   412→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   413→) -> str:
   414→    """Build Boss直聘 search URL with query parameters.
   415→
   416→    Note: Boss直聘 search uses infinite scroll, not URL-based pagination.
   417→    """
   418→    base_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   419→
   420→    params = {"query": keyword}
   421→
   422→    if location:
   423→        params["city"] = location
   424→
   425→    if experience:
   426→        params["experience"] = experience
   427→
   428→    if education:
   429→        params["degree"] = education
   430→
   431→    if salary:
   432→        params["salary"] = salary
   433→
   434→    url = f"{base_url}?{urlencode(params)}"
   435→    return url
   436→
   437→
   438→async def _scroll_search_results(page: Page) -> None:
   439→    """
   440→    Scroll the search results container to trigger auto-load.
   441→
   442→    Boss直聘 uses infinite scroll within an inner container,
   443→    not window-level scroll. We scroll the container or fall back
   444→    to keyboard-based scrolling.
   445→    """
   446→    # Try scrolling within the candidate list container
   447→    scrolled = await page.evaluate("""
   448→        () => {
   449→            // Find the scrollable container for search results
   450→            const containers = document.querySelectorAll(
   451→                '[class*="recommend-list"], [class*="geek-list"], [class*="search-result"],
   452→                 [class*="candidate-list"], [class*="card-list"], [class*="scroll-container"]'
   453→            );
   454→            for (const c of containers) {
   455→                if (c.scrollHeight > c.clientHeight) {
   456→                    c.scrollTop += 600;
   457→                    return true;
   458→                }
   459→            }
   460→
   461→            // Fallback: find any large scrollable div
   462→            const allDivs = document.querySelectorAll('div');
   463→            for (const d of allDivs) {
   464→                if (d.scrollHeight > d.clientHeight + 100 && d.clientHeight > 300) {
   465→                    d.scrollTop += 600;
   466→                    return true;
   467→                }
   468→            }
   469→
   470→            return false;
   471→        }
   472→    """)
   473→
   474→    if not scrolled:
   475→        # Final fallback: use keyboard Page Down
   476→        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   477→        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
   478→        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   479→
   480→    # Wait for new content to load
   481→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   482→
   483→
   484→async def _check_quota_exhausted(page: Page) -> bool:
   485→    """Check if Boss直聘 shows a quota exhaustion page."""
   486→    try:
   487→        result = await page.evaluate("""
   488→            () => {
   489→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   490→                const quotaIndicators = [
   491→                    '今日沟通次数已用完',
   492→                    '沟通次数已达上限',
   493→                    '今日联系人数已满',
   494→                    '升级会员',
   495→                    '开通会员享更多沟通'
   496→                ];
   497→                for (const indicator of quotaIndicators) {
   498→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   499→                        return true;
   500→                    }
   501→                }
   502→                return false;
   503→            }
   504→        """)
   505→        return result
   506→    except Exception:
   507→        return False
   508→
   509→
   510→def _save_candidates_to_db(
   511→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   512→    keywords: List[str],
   513→    db_manager,
   514→) -> None:
   515→    """Save or update candidates in the database."""
   516→    source = ', '.join(keywords)
   517→
   518→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   519→        # Batch-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   520→        boss_ids = [c.boss_id for c in candidates]
   521→        existing_map = {}
   522→        # Query in chunks of 500 to avoid SQLite variable limit
   523→        for i in range(0, len(boss_ids), 500):
   524→            chunk = boss_ids[i:i + 500]
   525→            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   526→                Candidate.boss_id.in_(chunk)
   527→            ).all()
   528→            for row in rows:
   529→                existing_map[row.boss_id] = row
   530→
   531→        for c in candidates:
   532→            existing = existing_map.get(c.boss_id)
   533→            if existing:
   534→                existing.name = c.name or existing.name
   535→                existing.title = c.title or existing.title
   536→                existing.company = c.company or existing.company
   537→                existing.location = c.location or existing.location
   538→                existing.salary_expect = c.salary_expect or existing.salary_expect
   539→                existing.work_years = c.work_years or existing.work_years
   540→                existing.education_level = c.education_level or existing.education_level
   541→                existing.profile_url = c.profile_url or existing.profile_url
   542→                if source and source not in (existing.source_search or ''):
   543→                    existing.source_search = f"{existing.source_search or ''}, {source}".strip(', ')
   544→            else:
   545→                new_candidate = Candidate(
   546→                    boss_id=c.boss_id,
   547→                    name=c.name,
   548→                    title=c.title,
   549→                    company=c.company,
   550→                    location=c.location,
   551→                    salary_expect=c.salary_expect,
   552→                    work_years=c.work_years,
   553→                    education_level=c.education_level,
   554→                    profile_url=c.profile_url,
   555→                    source_search=source,
   556→                )
   557→                session.add(new_candidate)
   558→
   559→
   560→def _display_results(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], keywords: List[str]) -> None:
   561→    """Display search results in a Rich table."""
   562→    if not candidates:
   563→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found.[/yellow]")
   564→        return
   565→
   566→    table = Table(title=f"Search Results ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   567→    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim", max_width=20)
   568→    table.add_column("Name", style="bold")
   569→    table.add_column("Title")
   570→    table.add_column("Company")
   571→    table.add_column("Location")
   572→    table.add_column("Salary Expect")
   573→    table.add_column("Experience")
   574→    table.add_column("Education")
   575→
   576→    for c in candidates[:50]:  # Show max 50 in table
   577→        table.add_row(
   578→            c.boss_id[:20],
   579→            c.name,
   580→            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   581→            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   582→            c.location or "",
   583→            c.salary_expect or "",
   584→            c.work_years or "",
   585→            c.education_level or "",
   586→        )
   587→
   588→    console.print(table)
   589→
   590→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   591→        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(candidates) - 50} more candidates[/dim]")
   592→

"""Export module for exporting candidate data.

Supports Excel (.xlsx) and CSV formats with optional
message history inclusion.
"""

from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional, Literal, List, Dict, Any

import pandas as pd
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
from openpyxl.utils.dataframe import dataframe_to_rows
from loguru import logger
from rich.console import Console

from src.utils.config import get_config
from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager

console = Console()


def export_candidates(
    output_format: Literal["excel", "xlsx", "csv"] = "excel",
    output_path: Optional[str] = None,
    include_messages: bool = True
) -> str:
    """
    Export candidate data to Excel or CSV.

    Args:
        output_format: Export format ('excel', 'xlsx', or 'csv')
        output_path: Output file path (auto-generated if None)
        include_messages: Include message history

    Returns:
        Path to exported file
    """
    config = get_config()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()

    if output_format == "xlsx":
        output_format = "excel"

    if output_path is None:
        export_dir = Path(config.get('data.export_dir', 'data/exports'))
        export_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
        extension = 'xlsx' if output_format == 'excel' else 'csv'
        output_path = str(export_dir / f"candidates_{timestamp}.{extension}")

    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    candidates_data = _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages)

    if not candidates_data:
        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to export[/yellow]")
        return ""

    df = _create_dataframe(candidates_data)

    if output_format == "excel":
        _export_to_excel(df, output_path)
    else:
        _export_to_csv(df, output_path)

    console.print(f"[green]Exported {len(candidates_data)} candidates to: {output_path}[/green]")
    return output_path


def _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages: bool) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Get candidate data from database."""
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        candidates = session.query(Candidate).all()

        data = []
        for candidate in candidates:
            record = {
                'boss_id': candidate.boss_id,
                'name': candidate.name,
                'title': candidate.title,
                'company': candidate.company,
                'location': candidate.location,
                'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect,
                'work_years': candidate.work_years,
                'education_level': candidate.education_level,
                'profile_url': candidate.profile_url,
                'first_seen': candidate.first_seen,
                'last_updated': candidate.last_updated,
                'source_search': candidate.source_search,
            }

            # Flatten education
            education = candidate.education or []
            if education:
                latest_edu = education[0]
                record['latest_education'] = _format_education(latest_edu)
            else:
                record['latest_education'] = ''

            # Flatten work experience
            work_exp = candidate.work_experience or []
            if work_exp:
                latest_work = work_exp[0]
                record['latest_experience'] = _format_work_experience(latest_work)
            else:
                record['latest_experience'] = ''

            # Format skills
            skills = candidate.skills or []
            record['skills'] = ', '.join(skills) if skills else ''

            data.append(record)

        # Batch-fetch message info to avoid N+1 queries
        if include_messages and data:
            from sqlalchemy import func

            boss_ids = [r['boss_id'] for r in data]
            # Get message counts and latest message per candidate in bulk
            msg_counts = {}
            latest_msgs = {}

            # Count messages per candidate
            count_rows = session.query(
                Message.candidate_boss_id,
                func.count(Message.id).label('cnt')
            ).filter(
                Message.candidate_boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
            ).group_by(Message.candidate_boss_id).all()

            for row in count_rows:
                msg_counts[row.candidate_boss_id] = row.cnt

            # Get latest message per candidate using a subquery
            from sqlalchemy import desc
            all_msgs = session.query(Message).filter(
                Message.candidate_boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
            ).order_by(Message.candidate_boss_id, desc(Message.created_at)).all()

            for msg in all_msgs:
                if msg.candidate_boss_id not in latest_msgs:
                    latest_msgs[msg.candidate_boss_id] = msg

            for record in data:
                bid = record['boss_id']
                record['message_count'] = msg_counts.get(bid, 0)
                latest_msg = latest_msgs.get(bid)
                if latest_msg:
                    record['last_message_status'] = latest_msg.status
                    record['last_message_date'] = latest_msg.sent_at or latest_msg.created_at
                    record['last_message_template'] = latest_msg.template_name
                else:
                    record['last_message_status'] = ''
                    record['last_message_date'] = None
                    record['last_message_template'] = ''

        return data


def _format_education(edu: Dict) -> str:
    """Format education entry as string."""
    parts = []
    if edu.get('school'):
        parts.append(edu['school'])
    if edu.get('degree'):
        parts.append(edu['degree'])
    if edu.get('major'):
        parts.append(edu['major'])
    return ' - '.join(parts) if parts else ''


def _format_work_experience(work: Dict) -> str:
    """Format work experience entry as string."""
    parts = []
    if work.get('title'):
        parts.append(work['title'])
    if work.get('company'):
        parts.append(f"@ {work['company']}")
    return ' '.join(parts) if parts else ''


def _create_dataframe(data: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Create pandas DataFrame from candidate data."""
    columns = [
        'boss_id',
        'name',
        'title',
        'company',
        'location',
        'salary_expect',
        'work_years',
        'education_level',
        'latest_education',
        'latest_experience',
        'skills',
        'profile_url',
        'source_search',
        'first_seen',
        'last_updated',
    ]

    if data and 'message_count' in data[0]:
        columns.extend([
            'message_count',
            'last_message_status',
            'last_message_date',
            'last_message_template',
        ])

    df = pd.DataFrame(data)

    existing_columns = [c for c in columns if c in df.columns]
    df = df[existing_columns]

    datetime_columns = ['first_seen', 'last_updated', 'last_message_date']
    for col in datetime_columns:
        if col in df.columns:
            df[col] = pd.to_datetime(df[col]).dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M').replace('NaT', '')

    return df


def _export_to_excel(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
    """Export DataFrame to Excel with formatting."""
    wb = Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    ws.title = "Candidates"

    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
    header_alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True)

    border = Border(
        left=Side(style='thin'),
        right=Side(style='thin'),
        top=Side(style='thin'),
        bottom=Side(style='thin')
    )

    for r_idx, row in enumerate(dataframe_to_rows(df, index=False, header=True), 1):
        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row, 1):
            cell = ws.cell(row=r_idx, column=c_idx, value=value)
            cell.border = border

            if r_idx == 1:
                cell.font = header_font
                cell.fill = header_fill
                cell.alignment = header_alignment
            else:
                cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)

    column_widths = {
        'A': 20,  # boss_id
        'B': 12,  # name
        'C': 25,  # title
        'D': 20,  # company
        'E': 12,  # location
        'F': 15,  # salary_expect
        'G': 12,  # work_years
        'H': 12,  # education_level
        'I': 30,  # latest_education
        'J': 30,  # latest_experience
        'K': 40,  # skills
        'L': 40,  # profile_url
        'M': 20,  # source_search
        'N': 18,  # first_seen
        'O': 18,  # last_updated
        'P': 12,  # message_count
        'Q': 15,  # last_message_status
        'R': 18,  # last_message_date
        'S': 15,  # last_message_template
    }

    for col, width in column_widths.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width

    ws.freeze_panes = 'A2'
    ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions

    wb.save(output_path)
    logger.info(f"Excel file saved to: {output_path}")


def _export_to_csv(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
    """Export DataFrame to CSV."""
    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig')
    logger.info(f"CSV file saved to: {output_path}")

1→"""Message sending module for Boss直聘.
     2→
     3→Handles sending templated messages to candidates through Boss直聘's
     4→chat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
     5→human confirmation and rate limiting.
     6→
     7→Boss直聘 chat flow:
     8→1. From search page (/web/chat/search), click "搜索畅聊卡" button
     9→2. Click "查看对话" to open the chat window
    10→3. Type message in #boss-chat-global-input
    11→4. Click "发送" button
    12→5. Close chat via div.iboss.iboss-close
    13→
    14→Key differences from Maimai:
    15→- Boss直聘 uses "搜索畅聊卡" as the primary contact action from search
    16→- Chat input is a div with id #boss-chat-global-input (not textarea)
    17→- Chat opens as an overlay on the current page
    18→- Main page URL: /web/chat/search
    19→"""
    20→
    21→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    22→from typing import Dict, List, Optional
    23→
    24→from patchright.async_api import Page
    25→from loguru import logger
    26→from rich.console import Console
    27→from rich.panel import Panel
    28→
    29→import questionary
    30→
    31→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    32→from src.utils.config import get_config
    33→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    34→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    35→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    36→from src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
    37→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    38→from src.exceptions.errors import (
    39→    BrowserError,
    40→    PermanentFailureError,
    41→    SelectorNotFoundError,
    42→)
    43→
    44→console = Console()
    45→
    46→
    47→def render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    48→    """
    49→    Render a message template with variable substitution.
    50→
    51→    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    52→    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).
    53→
    54→    Args:
    55→        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
    56→        variables: Variable name-value pairs
    57→
    58→    Returns:
    59→        Rendered message string
    60→    """
    61→    import re
    62→
    63→    content = template['content']
    64→
    65→    def replacer(match):
    66→        var_name = match.group(1)
    67→        if var_name in variables:
    68→            return str(variables[var_name])
    69→        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable
    70→
    71→    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    72→    return content
    73→
    74→
    75→async def send_message(
    76→    boss_id: str,
    77→    template_name: str,
    78→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    79→    preview_only: bool = False,
    80→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    81→) -> bool:
    82→    """
    83→    Send a templated message to a candidate on Boss直聘.
    84→
    85→    Args:
    86→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
    87→        template_name: Name of the message template
    88→        variables: Template variable overrides
    89→        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
    90→        browser: Browser manager instance
    91→
    92→    Returns:
    93→        True if message sent successfully
    94→    """
    95→    if browser is None:
    96→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    97→
    98→    page = browser.page
    99→    if not page:
   100→        page = await browser.start()
   101→
   102→    config = get_config()
   103→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   104→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   105→
   106→    # Load template
   107→    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   108→
   109→    # Merge variables
   110→    final_vars = dict(variables or {})
   111→
   112→    # Try to fill candidate info from database
   113→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   114→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   115→        if candidate:
   116→            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
   117→                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
   118→            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
   119→                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
   120→            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
   121→                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title
   122→
   123→    # Validate variables
   124→    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)
   125→
   126→    # Render message
   127→    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)
   128→
   129→    # Preview
   130→    console.print(Panel(
   131→        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
   132→        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   133→        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
   134→        title="Message Preview",
   135→        border_style="cyan"
   136→    ))
   137→
   138→    if preview_only:
   139→        console.print("[dim]Preview only — message not sent.[/dim]")
   140→        return False
   141→
   142→    # Confirm send (skip if no TTY available)
   143→    import sys
   144→    if sys.stdin.isatty():
   145→        confirm = questionary.confirm(
   146→            "Send this message?",
   147→            default=False,
   148→        ).ask()
   149→    else:
   150→        confirm = False
   151→
   152→    if not confirm:
   153→        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
   154→        # Record cancellation
   155→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
   156→        return False
   157→
   158→    # Rate limit check
   159→    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   160→
   161→    try:
   162→        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
   163→        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   164→        if not success:
   165→            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")
   166→
   167→        # Type and send the message
   168→        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   169→
   170→        # Log success
   171→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
   172→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   173→
   174→        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
   175→        return True
   176→
   177→    except PermanentFailureError as e:
   178→        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   179→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   180→        rate_limiter.report_error()
   181→        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
   182→        return False
   183→    except Exception as e:
   184→        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
   185→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   186→        rate_limiter.report_error()
   187→        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   188→        return False
   189→
   190→
   191→async def send_message_batch(
   192→    candidates: list,
   193→    template_name: str,
   194→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
   195→    interactive: bool = True,
   196→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   197→    dry_run: bool = False,
   198→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   199→) -> Dict[str, int]:
   200→    """
   201→    Send messages to multiple candidates.
   202→
   203→    Args:
   204→        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
   205→        template_name: Template name
   206→        variables: Shared template variables
   207→        interactive: Confirm each message individually
   208→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
   209→        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
   210→        browser: Browser manager instance
   211→
   212→    Returns:
   213→        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
   214→    """
   215→    if browser is None:
   216→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   217→
   218→    config = get_config()
   219→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   220→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   221→
   222→    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   223→
   224→    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
   225→        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   226→            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
   227→            name = candidate.get('name', '')
   228→            title = candidate.get('title', '')
   229→            company = candidate.get('company', '')
   230→        else:
   231→            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
   232→            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
   233→            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
   234→            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')
   235→
   236→        if not boss_id:
   237→            stats['skipped'] += 1
   238→            continue
   239→
   240→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")
   241→
   242→        # Check if already messaged
   243→        if skip_messaged:
   244→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   245→                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   246→                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
   247→                ).first()
   248→                if existing_msg:
   249→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
   250→                    stats['skipped'] += 1
   251→                    continue
   252→
   253→        if dry_run:
   254→            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run — would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
   255→            stats['sent'] += 1
   256→            continue
   257→
   258→        # Build per-candidate variables
   259→        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
   260→        if name:
   261→            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
   262→        if company:
   263→            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
   264→        if title:
   265→            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)
   266→
   267→        try:
   268→            if interactive:
   269→                # Use single send (with preview + confirmation)
   270→                result = await send_message(
   271→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   272→                    template_name=template_name,
   273→                    variables=per_vars,
   274→                    browser=browser,
   275→                )
   276→                if result:
   277→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   278→                else:
   279→                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
   280→            else:
   281→                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
   282→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   283→
   284→                template = config.get_template(template_name)
   285→                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
   286→                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)
   287→
   288→                page = browser.page
   289→                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   290→                if success:
   291→                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   292→                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   293→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   294→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   295→                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
   296→                else:
   297→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   298→                    stats['failed'] += 1
   299→                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")
   300→
   301→        except Exception as e:
   302→            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   303→            stats['failed'] += 1
   304→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   305→
   306→        # Delay between messages
   307→        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
   308→            await async_random_delay('message')
   309→
   310→    # Summary
   311→    console.print(Panel(
   312→        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
   313→        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
   314→        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
   315→        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
   316→        title="Batch Message Summary",
   317→    ))
   318→
   319→    return stats
   320→
   321→
   322→async def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
   323→    """
   324→    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.
   325→
   326→    Tries multiple strategies:
   327→    1. Direct chat URL (if known)
   328→    2. Navigate to candidate profile and click "立即沟通"
   329→    3. Search in existing conversations
   330→
   331→    Args:
   332→        page: Playwright page instance
   333→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
   334→        db_manager: Database manager
   335→
   336→    Returns:
   337→        True if chat window is ready
   338→    """
   339→    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   340→
   341→    # Get profile URL from database
   342→    profile_url = None
   343→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   344→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   345→        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
   346→            profile_url = candidate.profile_url
   347→
   348→    # Strategy 1: Navigate to profile and click chat button
   349→    if profile_url:
   350→        try:
   351→            await page.goto(profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   352→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   353→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   354→
   355→            # Look for "立即沟通" button
   356→            chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
   357→            if chat_button:
   358→                await chat_button.click()
   359→                await async_random_delay('action')
   360→                # Wait for chat to load
   361→                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   362→                return True
   363→        except Exception as e:
   364→            logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (profile click) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   365→
   366→    # Strategy 2: Try direct geek URL
   367→    try:
   368→        geek_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
   369→        await page.goto(geek_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   370→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   371→        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   372→
   373→        chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
   374→        if chat_button:
   375→            await chat_button.click()
   376→            await async_random_delay('action')
   377→            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   378→            return True
   379→    except Exception as e:
   380→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (direct geek URL) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   381→
   382→    # Strategy 3: Try to find a chat link on the current page
   383→    try:
   384→        # Check if there's a chat link on the current page
   385→        chat_link = await page.query_selector(
   386→            'a[href*="chat"], a[href*="im"], [class*="chat-link"]'
   387→        )
   388→        if chat_link:
   389→            await chat_link.click()
   390→            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   391→            return True
   392→    except Exception as e:
   393→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 3 (chat link) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   394→
   395→    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
   396→    return False
   397→
   398→
   399→async def _find_chat_button(page: Page):
   400→    """Find the chat/communication button on the page."""
   401→    selectors = [
   402→        'button:has-text("搜索畅聊卡")',
   403→        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
   404→        'a:has-text("立即沟通")',
   405→        'button:has-text("开始沟通")',
   406→        'button:has-text("继续沟通")',
   407→        '[class*="btn-chat"]',
   408→        '[class*="chat-btn"]',
   409→    ]
   410→
   411→    for selector in selectors:
   412→        try:
   413→            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   414→            if element and await element.is_visible():
   415→                return element
   416→        except Exception:
   417→            continue
   418→
   419→    return None
   420→
   421→
   422→async def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
   423→    """
   424→    Type a message into the chat input and send it.
   425→
   426→    Args:
   427→        page: Playwright page instance
   428→        message: Message text to send
   429→    """
   430→    # Find the message input
   431→    # Recording confirmed: #boss-chat-global-input is the primary chat input (a div element)
   432→    input_selectors = [
   433→        '#boss-chat-global-input',
   434→        '[contenteditable="true"]',
   435→        '[class*="chat-input"] textarea',
   436→        '[class*="input-area"] textarea',
   437→        'textarea[class*="message"]',
   438→        'textarea',
   439→    ]
   440→
   441→    input_element = None
   442→    for selector in input_selectors:
   443→        try:
   444→            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   445→            if element and await element.is_visible():
   446→                input_element = element
   447→                break
   448→        except Exception:
   449→            continue
   450→
   451→    if not input_element:
   452→        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")
   453→
   454→    # Click to focus
   455→    await input_element.click()
   456→    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   457→
   458→    # Clear any existing content (use Meta+a on macOS, Control+a elsewhere)
   459→    import sys
   460→    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   461→    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   462→    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
   463→    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)
   464→
   465→    # Type message with human-like timing
   466→    # For longer messages, use fill() to avoid timeout, then add small delay
   467→    if len(message) > 50:
   468→        await input_element.fill(message)
   469→    else:
   470→        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)
   471→
   472→    await async_random_delay('action')
   473→
   474→    # Find and click send button
   475→    # Recording confirmed: send button contains text "发送" (span inside button)
   476→    send_selectors = [
   477→        'text="发送"',
   478→        'button:has-text("发送")',
   479→        '[class*="btn-send"]',
   480→        '[class*="send-btn"]',
   481→    ]
   482→
   483→    for selector in send_selectors:
   484→        try:
   485→            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
   486→            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
   487→                await btn.click()
   488→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   489→                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
   490→                return
   491→        except Exception:
   492→            continue
   493→
   494→    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
   495→    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
   496→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   497→    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")
   498→
   499→
   500→def _save_message_to_db(
   501→    boss_id: str,
   502→    template_name: str,
   503→    content: str,
   504→    status: str,
   505→    db_manager,
   506→) -> None:
   507→    """Save a message record to the database."""
   508→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   509→        message = Message(
   510→            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
   511→            template_name=template_name,
   512→            content=content,
   513→            status=status,
   514→            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
   515→        )
   516→        session.add(message)
   517→

file.content:
"""Message sending module for Boss直聘.

Handles sending templated messages to candidates through Boss直聘's
chat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
human confirmation and rate limiting.

Boss直聘 chat flow:
1. From search page (/web/chat/search), click "搜索畅聊卡" button
2. Click "查看对话" to open the chat window
3. Type message in #boss-chat-global-input
4. Click "发送" button
5. Close chat via div.iboss.iboss-close

Key differences from Maimai:
- Boss直聘 uses "搜索畅聊卡" as the primary contact action from search
- Chat input is a div with id #boss-chat-global-input (not textarea)
- Chat opens as an overlay on the current page
- Main page URL: /web/chat/search
"""

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Dict, List, Optional

from patchright.async_api import Page
from loguru import logger
from rich.console import Console
from rich.panel import Panel

import questionary

from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
from src.utils.config import get_config
from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
from src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
from src.exceptions.errors import (
    BrowserError,
    PermanentFailureError,
    SelectorNotFoundError,
)

console = Console()


def render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    """
    Render a message template with variable substitution.

    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).

    Args:
        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
        variables: Variable name-value pairs

    Returns:
        Rendered message string
    """
    import re

    content = template['content']

    def replacer(match):
        var_name = match.group(1)
        if var_name in variables:
            return str(variables[var_name])
        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable

    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    return content


async def send_message(
    boss_id: str,
    template_name: str,
    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    preview_only: bool = False,
    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
) -> bool:
    """
    Send a templated message to a candidate on Boss直聘.

    Args:
        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
        template_name: Name of the message template
        variables: Template variable overrides
        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
        browser: Browser manager instance

    Returns:
        True if message sent successfully
    """
    if browser is None:
        browser = get_browser_manager()

    page = browser.page
    if not page:
        page = await browser.start()

    config = get_config()
    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()

    # Load template
    template = config.get_template(template_name)

    # Merge variables
    final_vars = dict(variables or {})

    # Try to fill candidate info from database
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
        if candidate:
            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title

    # Validate variables
    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)

    # Render message
    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)

    # Preview
    console.print(Panel(
        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
        title="Message Preview",
        border_style="cyan"
    ))

    if preview_only:
        console.print("[dim]Preview only — message not sent.[/dim]")
        return False

    # Confirm send (skip if no TTY available)
    import sys
    if sys.stdin.isatty():
        confirm = questionary.confirm(
            "Send this message?",
            default=False,
        ).ask()
    else:
        confirm = False

    if not confirm:
        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
        # Record cancellation
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
        return False

    # Rate limit check
    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')

    try:
        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
        if not success:
            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")

        # Type and send the message
        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)

        # Log success
        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)

        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
        return True

    except PermanentFailureError as e:
        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
        rate_limiter.report_error()
        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
        rate_limiter.report_error()
        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
        return False


async def send_message_batch(
    candidates: list,
    template_name: str,
    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    interactive: bool = True,
    skip_messaged: bool = True,
    dry_run: bool = False,
    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
) -> Dict[str, int]:
    """
    Send messages to multiple candidates.

    Args:
        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
        template_name: Template name
        variables: Shared template variables
        interactive: Confirm each message individually
        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
        browser: Browser manager instance

    Returns:
        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
    """
    if browser is None:
        browser = get_browser_manager()

    config = get_config()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()

    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}

    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
            name = candidate.get('name', '')
            title = candidate.get('title', '')
            company = candidate.get('company', '')
        else:
            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')

        if not boss_id:
            stats['skipped'] += 1
            continue

        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")

        # Check if already messaged
        if skip_messaged:
            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
                ).first()
                if existing_msg:
                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
                    stats['skipped'] += 1
                    continue

        if dry_run:
            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run — would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
            stats['sent'] += 1
            continue

        # Build per-candidate variables
        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
        if name:
            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
        if company:
            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
        if title:
            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)

        try:
            if interactive:
                # Use single send (with preview + confirmation)
                result = await send_message(
                    boss_id=boss_id,
                    template_name=template_name,
                    variables=per_vars,
                    browser=browser,
                )
                if result:
                    stats['sent'] += 1
                else:
                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
            else:
                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')

                template = config.get_template(template_name)
                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)

                page = browser.page
                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
                if success:
                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
                    stats['sent'] += 1
                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
                else:
                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
                    stats['failed'] += 1
                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")

        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
            stats['failed'] += 1
            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")

        # Delay between messages
        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
            await async_random_delay('message')

    # Summary
    console.print(Panel(
        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
        title="Batch Message Summary",
    ))

    return stats


async def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
    """
    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.

    Tries multiple strategies:
    1. Direct chat URL (if known)
    2. Navigate to candidate profile and click "立即沟通"
    3. Search in existing conversations

    Args:
        page: Playwright page instance
        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
        db_manager: Database manager

    Returns:
        True if chat window is ready
    """
    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id

    # Get profile URL from database
    profile_url = None
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
            profile_url = candidate.profile_url

    # Strategy 1: Navigate to profile and click chat button
    if profile_url:
        try:
            await page.goto(profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
            await async_random_delay('page_load')
            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)

            # Look for "立即沟通" button
            chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
            if chat_button:
                await chat_button.click()
                await async_random_delay('action')
                # Wait for chat to load
                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
                return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (profile click) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")

    # Strategy 2: Try direct geek URL
    try:
        geek_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
        await page.goto(geek_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await async_random_delay('page_load')
        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)

        chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
        if chat_button:
            await chat_button.click()
            await async_random_delay('action')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (direct geek URL) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")

    # Strategy 3: Try to find a chat link on the current page
    try:
        # Check if there's a chat link on the current page
        chat_link = await page.query_selector(
            'a[href*="chat"], a[href*="im"], [class*="chat-link"]'
        )
        if chat_link:
            await chat_link.click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"Strategy 3 (chat link) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")

    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
    return False


async def _find_chat_button(page: Page):
    """Find the chat/communication button on the page."""
    selectors = [
        'button:has-text("搜索畅聊卡")',
        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
        'a:has-text("立即沟通")',
        'button:has-text("开始沟通")',
        'button:has-text("继续沟通")',
        '[class*="btn-chat"]',
        '[class*="chat-btn"]',
    ]

    for selector in selectors:
        try:
            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if element and await element.is_visible():
                return element
        except Exception:
            continue

    return None


async def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
    """
    Type a message into the chat input and send it.

    Args:
        page: Playwright page instance
        message: Message text to send
    """
    # Find the message input
    # Recording confirmed: #boss-chat-global-input is the primary chat input (a div element)
    input_selectors = [
        '#boss-chat-global-input',
        '[contenteditable="true"]',
        '[class*="chat-input"] textarea',
        '[class*="input-area"] textarea',
        'textarea[class*="message"]',
        'textarea',
    ]

    input_element = None
    for selector in input_selectors:
        try:
            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if element and await element.is_visible():
                input_element = element
                break
        except Exception:
            continue

    if not input_element:
        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")

    # Click to focus
    await input_element.click()
    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)

    # Clear any existing content (use Meta+a on macOS, Control+a elsewhere)
    import sys
    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)

    # Type message with human-like timing
    # For longer messages, use fill() to avoid timeout, then add small delay
    if len(message) > 50:
        await input_element.fill(message)
    else:
        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)

    await async_random_delay('action')

    # Find and click send button
    # Recording confirmed: send button contains text "发送" (span inside button)
    send_selectors = [
        'text="发送"',
        'button:has-text("发送")',
        '[class*="btn-send"]',
        '[class*="send-btn"]',
    ]

    for selector in send_selectors:
        try:
            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
                await btn.click()
                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
                return
        except Exception:
            continue

    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")


def _save_message_to_db(
    boss_id: str,
    template_name: str,
    content: str,
    status: str,
    db_manager,
) -> None:
    """Save a message record to the database."""
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        message = Message(
            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
            template_name=template_name,
            content=content,
            status=status,
            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
        )
        session.add(message)

   288→    table.add_column("Daily Used")
   289→    table.add_column("Daily Limit")
   290→    table.add_column("Daily Remaining")
   291→
   292→    for action_type in ['search', 'view_profile', 'send_message']:
   293→        quota = rate_limiter.get_quota_status(action_type)
   294→        h = quota['hourly']
   295→        d = quota['daily']
   296→
   297→        table.add_row(
   298→            action_type,
   299→            str(h['used']),
   300→            str(h['limit']),
   301→            str(h['remaining']),
   302→            str(d['used']),
   303→            str(d['limit']),
   304→            str(d['remaining']),
   305→        )
   306→
   307→    console.print(table)
   308→
   309→    throttle = rate_limiter.throttle_factor
   310→    if throttle < 1.0:
   311→        console.print(f"\n[yellow]Adaptive throttle active: {throttle:.1f}x[/yellow]")
   312→    else:
   313→        console.print(f"\n[green]Throttle: normal (1.0x)[/green]")
   314→
   315→
   316→@cli.command()
   317→def logout():
   318→    """Clear saved session."""
   319→    from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   320→
   321→    session_mgr = get_session_manager()
   322→
   323→    if session_mgr.has_saved_session():
   324→        run_async(session_mgr.clear())
   325→        console.print("[green]Session cleared.[/green]")
   326→    else:
   327→        console.print("[dim]No saved session found.[/dim]")
   328→
   329→
   330→def main():
   331→    """Entry point for the CLI."""
   332→    cli(obj={})
   333→
   334→
   335→if __name__ == '__main__':
   336→    main()
   337→

file.content:
"""Shared captcha detection utility.

Detects captcha elements on page and pauses for manual resolution.
Boss直聘 may use Geetest slider captcha or similar mechanisms.
"""

import asyncio
import sys

from patchright.async_api import Page
from loguru import logger
from rich.console import Console

console = Console()

CAPTCHA_SELECTORS = [
    '[class*="captcha"]',
    '[class*="verify"]',
    '[id*="captcha"]',
    '[class*="slider"]',
    '[class*="geetest"]',
    'iframe[src*="captcha"]',
    '[class*="verify-wrap"]',
    '[class*="slide-verify"]',
]


async def _async_input() -> str:
    """Read a line from stdin without blocking the event loop."""
    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    return await loop.run_in_executor(None, sys.stdin.readline)


async def check_captcha(page: Page, report_to_rate_limiter: bool = False) -> None:
    """Detect captcha elements on page and pause for manual resolution."""
    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
        try:
            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
                if report_to_rate_limiter:
                    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
                    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
                    rate_limiter.report_captcha()

                console.print("[bold red]Captcha detected! Please solve it in the browser window.[/bold red]")
                console.print("[dim]Press Enter here after solving the captcha...[/dim]")
                await _async_input()
                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
                return
        except Exception:
            continue
